goal: 实现 issue #44：将 cxs skill 改为按 retrieval primitive 路由

summary.title: 将 cxs skill 改为按 retrieval primitive 路由
summary.what: 更新发行版 cxs skill 及 references，把固定 status-first 流程改成按 metadata projection、semantic recall、content reading、coverage/freshness、mutation 五类检索原语选择工具。补充 read-only SQLite metadata projection 示例，并明确内容证据必须通过 read-page/read-range 获取。
summary.why: 用户指出 CXS 不应该把特殊路径或归档概念暴露给 agent，也不应该每遇到一个慢查询 edge case 就打补丁；issue #44 要把 skill 合约提升为通用 primitive-routing policy。
summary.user_goal: 实现 issue #44：将 cxs skill 改为按 retrieval primitive 路由

decisions.chose: 把主 SKILL 的起手表替换为 retrieval primitive router。
decisions.rationale: metadata、semantic recall、coverage diagnosis 和 content verification 的最短正确路径不同；固定 status-first 会让 metadata-only 问题变慢且过宽。
rejected: 继续维护 status -> coverage -> find/list -> read 的单一路径

decisions.chose: 允许 read-only SQLite/bash/jq 直接查询 cxs index 的稳定 session metadata 字段。
decisions.rationale: 数量、时间排序、cwd 分布和候选 session 清单不需要全文召回；但内容结论仍要用 cxs read 命令验证。
rejected: 为 metadata-only 问题新增 CLI 子命令
让 agent 扫 raw session files

decisions.chose: 保留 archive-agnostic 指引：正常历史检索只读 cxs index，不引导 agent 切换 source root 或查 raw Codex JSONL。
decisions.rationale: cxs 已默认保留已索引历史；skill 应让 agent 无感使用 index/evidence 层。
rejected: 把特殊 source-root 或 raw-file 查找作为普通 workflow

decisions.chose: 只改 skill/docs，不改 CLI、SQLite schema、package version。
decisions.rationale: issue #44 是 agent skill contract 变更；现有 CLI primitives 已覆盖需要的行为。
rejected: 添加 list oldest/order asc 等新 CLI surface

review_notes: 验证通过 npm run check：25 个 test files、131 个 tests 全通过。
验证通过 rg 负检：skill-packages/cxs 内无 cxsd、archived_sessions、archive root、归档。
验证通过 rg 正检：primitive、metadata、SQLite、read-only、status 路由文案存在。
Smoke 覆盖 installed cxs 0.3.2：read-only SQLite metadata projection + read-page、find semantic recall、status --cwd coverage diagnosis。

architectural_claims: cxs skill treats the SQLite index as the normal history source of truth.
Agent workflow chooses retrieval primitives instead of following one fixed command sequence.
Read-only SQLite is an allowed metadata projection layer, while read-page/read-range remain the content evidence layer.
behavioral_changes: Agents should use read-only SQLite/list for metadata-only questions before validating content with read commands.
Agents should use find for semantic recall and status only for coverage/freshness/index availability.
Agents should treat slow or over-broad metadata-only cxs usage as a skill-guidance issue.
security_implications: No secrets handling changes. SQLite guidance is explicitly read-only and limited to stable indexed session metadata fields.
migration_notes: No runtime migration, schema migration, or npm version bump required for this docs-only change.
